name: King Cash Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: King Cash Pawn & Jewelry operates 8 locations across South Florida, offering pawn loans, item sales, and buy-now-pay-later financing with rates starting at 3% monthly.
description_long:
King Cash Pawn & Jewelry is a regional pawn chain headquartered in South Florida with eight physical store locations. The company positions itself as a community-focused alternative to traditional pawn shops, emphasizing friendly customer service and multilingual staff (English, Spanish, and Creole). Founded on a model of quick cash transactions and item appraisals, the business serves customers seeking collateral-based lending or looking to sell unwanted merchandise.

The company offers three primary services: pawn loans with same-day funding, direct purchase of items for cash, and a financing program called "Shop Now Pay Later" offering 0% interest for up to 6 months. Their pawn loan terms include a minimum 61-day repayment period with interest starting at 3% monthly (36% APR), and they accept a wide range of collateral including gold, diamonds, watches, musical instruments, electronics, and tools. They advertise paying 95% of gold value and offer free in-person and online appraisals.

Key differentiators include their MobilePawn app for managing pawns and payments remotely, a stated A+ rating, multilingual customer service, and their positioning as "the friendliest pawn shops in South Florida." They emphasize quick turnaround—"pawn today, get paid today"—and the ability to extend loans by paying accrued interest. Their financing option targets customers with employment and bank accounts who want to defer purchases.

As with all pawn operations, the core business model involves high-interest short-term lending secured by personal property. While transparent about their 3% monthly rates (36% APR), this remains significantly above traditional lending. The financing option has unspecified restrictions, and customers should carefully review terms before borrowing. The company's regional footprint limits accessibility for non-South Florida residents.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Advertises paying 95% of gold value, positioning favorably against typical pawn markups
Offers free in-person and online appraisals with no obligation to pawn
MobilePawn app enables remote payment, renewal, and extension management
Multilingual staff (English, Spanish, Creole) serving diverse South Florida population
Same-day funding for pawn loans with transparent 3% monthly interest rate disclosure
0% interest buy-now-pay-later financing for up to 6 months (with restrictions)
Eight physical locations across South Florida for accessibility and local service
cons: 3% monthly pawn interest rate (36% APR) is significantly higher than personal loans or credit alternatives
Minimum 61-day repayment period on pawn loans limits flexibility for short-term needs
Buy-now-pay-later financing has unspecified restrictions that may limit eligibility
Limited to eight South Florida locations, making service unavailable for most U.S. consumers
Collateral risk: pawned items may be forfeited if loans are not repaid, resulting in loss of personal property
best_for: South Florida residents needing immediate cash and willing to pledge personal items as collateral
People selling unwanted jewelry, electronics, watches, or musical instruments for quick cash
Customers with poor credit seeking 0% interest financing with minimal documentation (job + bank account)
Spanish or Creole-speaking individuals seeking culturally responsive financial services
diagnosis: King Cash Pawn & Jewelry is best suited for South Florida residents who need immediate cash and have valuable personal items to pledge as collateral, or who want to sell unwanted merchandise quickly. Primary caveat: pawn loans carry 36% APR interest, which is substantially higher than unsecured personal loans or credit alternatives—borrowers should exhaust other options first, and the buy-now-pay-later terms should be carefully reviewed for restrictions before applying.
services: Pawn loans with same-day funding (minimum 61-day term, 3% monthly interest starting rate)
Direct purchase and sale of gold, diamonds, and jewelry for cash
Purchase of watches, musical instruments, electronics, and tools
Free in-person item appraisals at store locations
Pawn loan extension by paying accrued interest
Buy-now-pay-later financing (0% interest up to 6 months, requires employment and bank account)
MobilePawn app for payment management and loan renewal from home
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
